# A F Brock and Co Ltd

Invaluable Seller since 2007

**Welcome to A F Brock**

A F Brock and Company Ltd are the North West of England's _leading_ auctioneers and valuers of coins, medals, banknotes, postage stamps, jewellery and collectibles.

The company holds regular public auction sales in the Manchester area and the catalogues for these auctions are available on this Web site.

If you have any items that you would like to enter in a sale, please contact us.

Our buying department will always be pleased to make an offer of purchase, if preferred.

A F Brock and Company Ltd undertake valuations for insurance, probate and family division.

It will be our pleasure to be of further assistance to you in one or more of these areas. General enquiries can be _E-mailed_ to us using the Contact Details above.

[Read More](https://www.invaluable.com/auction-house/a-f-brock-and-co-ltd-5m5l8ir4qb/#house-bio-section)
